data.description:
## Context
Complete the migration: remove the legacy HMAC operation-cert scheme so both signature types are asymmetric, handling existing HMAC certificates via an expand-contract migration rather than a flag-day break.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A test asserts no code path signs or accepts an HMAC operation-cert.
- [ ] Existing HMAC certificates are handled by an expand-contract migration (documented cutover window / re-issue), not a flag-day break.
- [ ] Rollback: the required-environment policy is opt-in and defaults off; disabling it reverts to local behavior.
data.title: op-cert: remove legacy HMAC scheme (contract phase) + expand-contract migration
